name: riskofficer
tagline: Risk management, portfolio optimization (BL, ERC, Calmar), pre-trade checks, cross-portfolio correlation.
description: Risk management and portfolio analytics: VaR, Monte Carlo, stress tests, Risk Parity (ERC/CVaR), Calmar, Black-Litterman optimization, pre-trade risk checks, batch portfolios, cross-portfolio PnL correlation with crisis regime analysis. Run risk assessments, scenarios, and allocation optimization on virtual portfolios; no real broker orders.
